differentials.name: bowed legs; swelling of wrists + ankles; rachitic rosary
differentials.raw: bowed legs; swelling of wrists + ankles; rachitic rosary

context: =  osteomalacia during enchondral bone growth Age:   4-18 months Histo:   zone of maturation has an increase in the number of maturing cartilage cells with loss of normal columnar arrangement; zone of preparatory calcification does not form; failure of osteoid mineralization also in shafts so that osteoid production elevates periosteum Location:   metaphyses of long bones subjected to stress are particularly involved (wrists, ankles, knees); costochondral junction of ribs √  poorly mineralized irregular epiphyseal centers with delayed appearance √  axial widening of growth plate = ↑ distance b
